catalysts_general: Discovery: Micron announced high‑volume HBM4 production for NVIDIA’s Vera Rubin with shipments a quarter early, reinforcing tight AI memory supply and pricing power into 2026.
growth_picks.analyst_take: HBM4 leadership and early shipments to NVIDIA keep AI memory supply tight through FY26–27, sustaining outsized margins and earnings momentum.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Company disclosed Now Assist AI ACV >$600M for 2025 and reiterated strong 2026 guidance, evidencing real AI monetization at scale within core workflows.
growth_picks.analyst_take: High-quality workflow platform with real AI monetization (Now Assist >$600M ACV, tracking toward ~$1B in 2026), insider open-market buy by CEO, and April 22 earnings catalyst after a severe drawdown; valuation reset offers favorable risk/reward.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Cluster buy near 52‑week lows: activist JANA Partners added ~236k shares for ~$9.7M on Apr 7–8, 2026; directors Peter J. Bensen (~$197K on Apr 6) and Norman Prestage (~$103K on Apr 7) also bought within days.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Insider cluster buying and raised FY26 outlook with capex cuts support rebound as international headwinds ease.

catalysts_general: Discovery: 10% owner Kenneth Bryan Dart has been steadily buying; filings include ~$29.5M of common shares on Mar 30, 2026 and additional large purchases reported Apr 10, lifting his stake above 20%.
growth_picks.analyst_take: US market leader FanDuel with upcoming Q1 results and World Cup tailwind; notable insider TRS accumulation; shares ~67% below 52W high at ~10x forward earnings.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Rate-shock solar laggard ~40%+ off highs; late-April earnings likely to update inventory/demand trajectory with potential gross-margin recovery.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Insider-backed product refresh (IQ9) and international expansion ahead of April 28 earnings; valuation reset offers upside if margin trough confirms.

catalysts_general: Discovery: ~25–30% below 52-week high as it divests fiber to refocus on towers; late-April earnings plus pending asset sale set up deleveraging and potential buybacks.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Refocus on core towers with fiber/small‑cell divestiture driving deleveraging and capital returns; April earnings and H1 close are near-term catalysts while dividend is covered by AFFO.

catalysts_general: Discovery: At or near multi‑year lows with valuation compression despite resilient cash flows; staples sentiment weak.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Value-priced packaged foods leader with resilient cash flow; Q4 FY26 expected to improve sequentially and Brazil exit simplifies portfolio.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Cluster buying: several insiders bought shares (~$800k+ combined) in early 2026.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Insider cluster buys and active buybacks support quality balance sheet into May 21 earnings; valuation fair, but integration and demand stabilization offer upside.

catalysts_general: Discovery: CFO executed a large open‑market purchase (~$1.7M) in March 2026 — notable size.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Insider buying, dividend reinstatement, and near-term US trade decisions support a re-rating while Keliber staged start adds optionality at a depressed valuation.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Guidance reset and ongoing user backlash to ‘AI‑first’ course changes raise risk that AI erodes content quality and pricing power despite scale.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Post-guidance reset with strong margins; buyback and insider buying ahead of May 4 earnings offers favorable risk/reward if bookings stabilize.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Announced nuclear decommissioning services contract (~$100M+) recently; newly public contractor winning work across defense/energy niches.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Post-spin government services contractor with ~10% FCF yield and reaffirmed FY26 outlook; deleveraging toward <3x plus fresh CTRIC IV/MQ-9/decommissioning awards support backlog growth and multiple rerating.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Strait of Hormuz closure and wider Gulf conflict are rerouting cargoes and boosting ton‑mile demand: product tanker rates spiked as owners avoid the Gulf and key carriers add surcharges or halt transits.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Product tanker tightness and Gulf routing disruptions keep rates elevated while STNG locks in multi‑year LR2 charters and continues buybacks, setting up cash‑rich earnings into Q2.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Iran‑linked actors are escalating attacks on U.S. water and critical infrastructure operators; an Apr 7, 2026 joint EPA/CISA advisory and Bloomberg reporting point to urgent OT security upgrades where Fortinet has strong offerings.
growth_picks.analyst_take: High-margin cybersecurity leader with platform expansion (SASE/OT); near-term earnings and critical-infrastructure funding offer catalysts.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Multiple insiders bought into weakness: CEO Douglas L. Kennedy purchased 11,296 shares for ~$397.7K on Mar 30, 2026; director Patrick Campion also bought (~$50K) the same day; three‑insider cluster totals roughly $549K.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Capital strengthened via preferred equity and sub-debt redemption, plus insider buying, de-risks the balance sheet and sets up Q1 2026 earnings (Apr 22) for a re-rating; valuation at ~1.0x P/B and ~8x forward P/E supports upside.

catalysts_general: Discovery: On Apr 8, 2026, Shah Capital filed an amended Schedule 13D and issued an open letter stating it will vote against the board slate and executive comp, escalating its activist campaign (ownership ~8%).
growth_picks.analyst_take: Activist pressure plus partner-driven royalties and May earnings could re-rate Novavax; high short interest adds squeeze optionality.

catalysts_general: Discovery: On Feb 3, 2026, Enact authorized a new $500M repurchase program (incremental to its prior authorization) and arranged repurchases from Genworth to maintain ownership, underscoring strong capital return capacity.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Capital return and resilient PMI economics: new $500M buyback, strong PMIERs sufficiency, and steady ROE ahead of the May 5/6 Q1 update.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Heavily discounted media asset amid strategic reviews and M&A speculation; asymmetric upside if a credible deal emerges.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Event-driven upside into April 23 PSKY vote with potential $31/share takeout; fundamentals mixed but FCF positive and leverage improving.

growth_picks.analyst_take: Binary FDA sNDA decision for FILSPARI in FSGS due Apr 13, 2026; IgAN base helps, but DUPLEX eGFR miss keeps CRL risk high—wait for outcome or post-move setup.

Insider-led accumulation ahead of May 5 earnings and ongoing Taiwan scaling offer upside, but a rich forward multiple and data-breach overhang keep risk/reward balanced—prefer buy-on-weakness near prior insider prints.

catalysts_general: Discovery: U.S. and allies accelerating high-end air defense: Pentagon and Lockheed struck a ~$4.7B undefinitized deal to ramp PAC-3 MSE interceptor output, and joint Army–Navy hypersonic testing signals sustained demand for advanced missiles.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Record $194B+ backlog and fresh missile/hypersonic awards support growth, but valuation and F-35 TR-3 execution risks warrant patience near 52-week highs.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Liquid-cooling and prefabricated AI power/cooling stacks are scaling quickly as hyperscalers push 50kW+ racks; management flagged a ~$15B backlog and rapid liquid-cooling order growth tied to AI builds.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Record AI data-center demand drives $15B backlog and strong 2026 guidance, but valuation near highs and insider selling argue for patience into earnings.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Record ~$44B backlog and above‑consensus 2026 outlook; management highlights data centers as fastest‑growing backlog segment and steps up transformer/manufacturing investments to meet AI grid demand.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Leading grid and utility contractor with record backlog and 2026 guidance tied to AI/data-center power demand, but valuation is rich near 52-week highs—wait for a better entry.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Raised 2026 AI‑networking revenue target to ~$3.25B with 800G deployments and 1.6T ramp for multi‑site AI clusters, signaling continued AI switch spend.
growth_picks.analyst_take: AI networking leader with strong margins and revised 2026 AI revenue goal, but valuation is full; await Q1 results and hyperscaler capex updates for a better entry.

catalysts_general: Discovery: NVIDIA invested $2B and partnered with Marvell on NVLink Fusion to enable custom XPUs and optical interconnects compatible with NVIDIA’s rack‑scale AI platforms.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Strategic NVLink Fusion tie-up with NVIDIA and record AI-driven growth strengthen long-term positioning, but shares trade near highs with limited upside and rich multiples; wait for a pullback.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Multiple insider open‑market buys clustered in early March 2026 — a higher‑signal confidence indicator.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Insider cluster buying into Apr 29 earnings; enVista IOLs back on market and MIEBO momentum support 2026 margin expansion, but net losses and reimbursement risk temper upside.

catalysts_general: Discovery: AI data‑center and grid‑modernization build‑out driving electrification demand; strong backlog and secular tailwinds.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Rich valuation near all-time highs despite strong AI/data-center and utility tailwinds; wait for a pullback or post-earnings setup.

catalysts_general: Discovery: European Patriot demand is stepping up amid missile/drone threats: the Netherlands awarded RTX a ~$627M Patriot-related contract as NATO stocks are redeployed and replenishment needs rise.
growth_picks.analyst_take: High-quality defense backlog and improving Pratt & Whitney trends, but valuation near highs limits risk-adjusted upside; prefer pullbacks post-earnings.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Airedale by Modine reports accelerating liquid-cooling demand; Modine cited sequential data-center sales up 31% with multi‑year AI thermal runway.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Spin-off of lower-margin Performance Technologies and Airedale data-center capacity ramp support multi-year growth, but shares near highs with rich multiples and negative near-term FCF warrant patience.

catalysts_general: Discovery: New three‑month FCA contract to analyze sensitive UK financial‑crime data showcases expanding AIP deployments beyond defense and health.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Defense program-of-record status and expanding UK public-sector wins support AIP momentum, but premium valuation argues for patience into Q1 results.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Associated Wholesale Grocers selected Symbotic to automate its Gulf Coast division support center (~114k sq ft), adding a new anchor customer beyond Walmart.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Warehouse automation leader with a $22.3B backlog anchored by Walmart, but valuation is premium; wait for Q2 FY26 proof of margin/FCF traction before adding.

catalysts_general: Discovery: White House raised and modernized Section 232 duties on steel, aluminum and certain copper products on Apr 6, 2026, improving pricing power for domestic producers like Nucor versus imports.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Tariff support and Q1 guidance aid near‑term earnings, but shares trade near highs with negative recent FCF and cyclical steel risks—prefer a pullback before buying.

catalysts_general: Discovery: PDUFA for AXS‑05 in Alzheimer’s agitation expected late April 2026; large unmet need implies high volatility.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Binary FDA decision for AXS-05 in Alzheimer’s agitation on April 30, 2026; valuation near highs limits upside into the event—prefer waiting for approval or pullback.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Turnaround plan (fleet simplification, cost actions) aims for profitability recovery; sentiment low and short interest elevated.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Hypersonic test cadence rising: Rocket Lab secured a contract up to ~$190M to fly U.S. hypersonic experiments on suborbital HASTE, positioning RKLB as an enabling vendor for DoD test infrastructure.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Backlog and major DoD satellite/hypersonic wins support growth, but Neutron delay and negative FCF keep risk/valuation elevated near term.
